questionHtml: Explain the effect of relative humidity on the rate of water uptake.
markschemeHtml:
a. increased «relative» humidity decreases water uptake
OR
inverse relationship 

b. increased «relative» humidity lowers transpiration «rate» 

c. diffusion gradient reduced «as humidity increases» 

d. less loss of water through stomata
OR
stomata closed

Accept inverse for dry/low humidity.

meta.title: Explain the effect of relative humidity on the rate of water uptake.
breadcrumbLabels: 9.1 Transport in the xylem of plants
